text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The clean, modern lines of the glass and the vivid, immersive design of the exhibit hint at a space devoted to exploration and thought. The R+D wall, brimming with information and creative displays, invites me to ponder the intersection of research, innovation, and human experience. I feel both small and significant—part of a larger inquiry into the nature of progress, technology, and the human mind.
